project_privacy_data_flows.description: The user discovers a Home Assistant server on the local network via Bonjour/mDNS or enters a URL manually. The server URL is stored for subsequent connections.

flow_steps.details: User taps 'Search' on the server discovery screen, starting Bonjour/mDNS discovery on the local network.
The app uses Android's NsdManager to discover Home Assistant instances on the local network, receiving server names and URLs.

flow_steps.code: suspend fun registerServer(url: String): RegisteredServer { ... store server URL in database }
flow_steps.details: The selected server URL is stored in the app's local database for future connections.
